_comment: TW timed threads — QA-F-1 revision. touch_triggers are interaction keys recorded via Player.record_interaction() at action points (dialogue end, mission accept), NOT raw dialogue flags. This correctly handles both one-time touches (flag flips once) and recurring touches (repeated NPC interactions reset the clock). Threads with last_touched_day=None stay inactive until an interaction kicks them off — so no drift fires on the first 30 days of a fresh playthrough.

drift_states.journal_entry_on_enter: Marcus's lead has gone cold. He stopped sending check-ins two weeks back. Next time you dock, he'll have less to say.
Marcus isn't sending anything anymore. Whatever was going to happen, happened without you.
Priya's delivery has been sitting in your hold for three weeks. She's started asking about it in clipped, formal language.
Tomas cornered you in the galley. A month without a real run and he's getting twitchy. He has a name in mind if you want one.
Elena's been quiet for over a month and a half. Her next greeting will acknowledge it. Her way.
